data.description:
## Why

CI keeps two ratchets advisory/non-gating (test.yml): full-tree mypy and the full-set ruff. The clean core (reducer/graph/_store) is mypy-gated, but the rest of src/rebar carries 158 mypy errors so gating it would red every build; and BLE001 (blind-except) is relaxed for tests/**. This let a type error reach CI on #56 (the local hook only runs ruff). Goal: drive the debt to zero and make both fully gating, so type/blind-except regressions fail at commit + CI, not after merge.

## What

- Drive `mypy src/rebar` to ZERO (158 errors / 37 files): llm (56), _engine_support (47), _engine (46), _io (6), _commands (3). Fix properly ŌĆö real annotations / guards / TypeGuards; a justified `# type: ignore[code]` ONLY for genuine external-untyped / false-positive cases, never blanket silencing.
- Tighten BLE001: remove `BLE001` from the `tests/**` per-file-ignore and resolve the 20 blind-excepts (specific exception types or inline-justified `# noqa: BLE001`). KEEP the T201 CLI-print ignores (intentional operator output ŌĆö out of scope).
- Flip CI to gating: expand `make typecheck` to the full `src/rebar`; make the test.yml mypy step gating (drop the advisory `|| true`); remove the now-redundant advisory full-set ruff step (the gating `make lint` already covers E,F,W,I,UP,B). Add a `typecheck` pre-commit hook so type errors fail at commit time.

## Scope

In scope: the mypy + BLE001 remediation + the CI/Makefile/hook gating flip. Out of scope (separate efforts, flagged): the module-size allowlist (file-splitting refactor), coverage fail_under=50 (needs new tests), the intentional T201 CLI-print ignores.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `mypy src/rebar` reports zero errors (was 158); fixes are real type corrections, with any `# type: ignore` carrying a code + one-line justification.
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes with BLE001 removed from the tests/** ignore (the 20 blind-excepts resolved); the T201 ignores are retained.
- [ ] `make typecheck` covers the full `src/rebar`; the CI mypy step is gating (no `|| true`); the redundant advisory ruff step is removed.
- [ ] A `typecheck` pre-commit hook runs `make typecheck` (check-only, never mutates), consistent with the existing lint hook.
- [ ] The full non-integration test suite stays green; no behavior change (type/lint-only edits).
data.title: Enable full mypy + ruff(BLE001) gating in CI ŌĆö remove the advisory ratchets
